articles.title: Jet fuel supplies are lagging. What does that mean for airlines and travelers? - AP News
articles.description: A looming jet fuel shortage in Europe and Asia sparked by the Iran war and the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz could further upend world travel within weeks if oil doesn’t start flowing soon. That means higher airfares and flight cancellations. Inte…
